CustomField.description: This is used to determine what stage to advance to
CustomField.formula: /*This evaluates all missing fields a to determine stage to be at*/ IF( CONTAINS(fxMissingFieldsstageAll__c,"0"), 0, IF( CONTAINS(fxMissingFieldsstageAll__c,"1"), 1, IF( CONTAINS(fxMissingFieldsstageAll__c,"2"), 2, IF( CONTAINS(fxMissingFieldsstageAll__c,"3"), 3, IF( CONTAINS(fxMissingFieldsstageAll__c,"4"), 4, IF( CONTAINS(fxMissingFieldsstageAll__c,"5"), 5, IF( CONTAINS(fxMissingFieldsstageAll__c,"6"), 6, IF( LEN(fxMissingFields_CW__c)>=1, 6, IF( LEN(fxMissingFields_CL__c)>=1, 8, IF( LEN(fxMissingFields_Abandonded__c)>=1, 9 , 9 ) )))))))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is used to determine what stage to advance to
CustomField.label: fxStage#ToAdvance
